name: Tianjin Zhonghuan Semiconductor Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianjin Zhonghuan Semiconductor Co., Ltd. provides semiconductor materials and devices, and new energy materials in China and internationally. The company offers solar energy materials, including solar mono-crystalline silicon rods, wafers, and materials, as well as solar polycrystalline silicon materials; solar products, such as mono-crystalline silicon solar cells; and photovoltaic power stations. It also provides semiconductor materials comprising etching, polished, float-zone mono-crystalline silicon, and czochralski mono-crystalline silicon wafers. In addition, the company offers semiconductor devices consisting of TVS protective, HV, bridge, and schottky diodes, as well as GPP chips and metal-oxide-semiconductor field-effect transistors. Its products are used in smart grid transmission, new energy vehicle, high-speed rail, wind power inverters, integrated circuits, consumer electronics, aerospace, solar power generation, etc. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Tianjin, China.
